resistors_tested.bias_ok_note: below 1.3V threshold due to DC offset amplification (Rf/Rcell=45.8x); AC measurement unaffected — no clipping confirmed

waveform_quality.evidence: asymmetry <1% on all clean measurements; clean sine waveform confirmed at 0.1 Hz

rp_accuracy.evidence: all values within 3.4% of nominal; systematic error explained by Rf=102.671kOhm (+2.67% over 100kOhm nominal)

rp_stability.evidence: std dev <0.33% across all runs; no drift between runs

glitch_detection.evidence: 1 asym=25.6% event correctly flagged WARN by firmware; AC Rp error was 28% confirming glitch must be excluded

i2c_devices.evidence: MCP4725 at 0x60, ADS1115 at 0x48 found at every startup across all 9 runs

bias_check.evidence: Vmid wiring correct; bias in 0.94-1.49V range; firmware correctly reports OK vs silent for 2.2k case

notes: C01 formally closed 2026-04-19. All 3 resistor values measured within PRD +-5% Rp accuracy target. Systematic under-reading (-1.8% to -3.4%) fully explained by Rf tolerance. Stage 1 circuit (2-op-amp) validated. Ready to proceed to C02.
